_comment_setup: Athena-first config: Enable athena_integration and pipeline auto-fills everything from Athena API!
_comment_brand: Leave empty if Athena enabled - will be auto-filled from /settings endpoint
_comment_target_prompt: Leave empty to see zero-mention prompts, or specify keyword (e.g., 'conversation analytics platform'). If enabled, pipeline fetches data from Athena API instead of CSV!
_comment_data_source: CSV filename and domain name. Only used if Athena mode disabled. Change domain_name to match your target industry (e.g., 'marketing automation', 'customer support software', etc.).
_comment_content_analysis: Step 3 now uses AI to auto-detect technical & industry terms from your data. No manual configuration needed! AI analyzes sample responses and extracts relevant vocabulary patterns automatically.

framer._comment: Set project_url and collection_id. API key comes from FRAMER_API_KEY env var. Nothing auto-publishes — user must approve first.

_comment_full_domain: Auto-filled from brand.url (which comes from Athena if enabled)

content.target_audience: VP Customer Support, VP Operations, Sales Leaders

_comment_content: Language, audience, and tone are auto-filled in article generation tasks.

social_monitor._comment_categories: Leave empty to auto-derive from athena target_prompt + content.target_audience. Or specify explicit search terms.

autonomous._comment_auto_publish: NEVER auto-publish. All content requires user approval via email digest.
